title: The Legends Were True
description:
Entering into a pitch dark chamber, a sudden light pierces the darkness from above, just as the door slams behind you.

Illuminated before you appears to be a podium with a map on it. You feel compelled to take it.

Suspicious.
conditions: All players have at least 10 HP
All players have a non-empty deck
notes:
The HP loss from [gold]Slowly Find an Exit[/gold] is [red]Unblockable[/red] and Unpowered — it ignores Block and is not modified by strength or other powers.

The potion reward is chosen randomly from the character's personal potion pool combined with the shared potion pool.
